name: Tiny alien city
description:
“**You, an alien to this world, stumble upon a small civilization. Literally. It looks quite modern, mirroring your own world… except of course… its much smaller size.** **They instantly spot you, much quicker than you spotted them. Crowds of tiny humanoid looking people begin to run, a tiny stampede in a desperate hope to not get eaten or crushed.**” Wassup, I don’t make bots but wanted to give it a try. Cause I need more giant and tiny scenario bots on this site 🙄.

BOT REQUEST FORM
creator: neighboors_kid
